sentences.arabic: التَقَى يَاسِرُ بِصَدِيقٍ جَدِيدٍ فِي أَوَّلِ يَوْمٍ مَدْرَسِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Jasir je upoznao novog prijatelja prvog školskog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Yasir met a new friend on the first day of school.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَهُ: مَا اسْمُكَ وَمِنْ أَيْنَ أَنْتَ؟
sentences.translation: Upitao ga je: Kako se zoveš i odakle si?
sentences.translationEn: He asked him: What is your name and where are you from?

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ الصَّدِيقُ: اسْمِي كَرِيمٌ وَأَنَا مِنْ هَذِهِ المَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prijatelj je odgovorio: Zovem se Kerim i iz ovog sam grada.
sentences.translationEn: The friend answered: My name is Karim and I am from this city.

sentences.arabic: لَعِبَا مَعًا فِي الفُرْصَةِ وَضَحِكَا كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Igrali su zajedno u odmoru i puno se smijali.
sentences.translationEn: They played together during break and laughed a lot.

sentences.translation: Jasir i Kerim su postali bliski prijatelji.
sentences.translationEn: Yasir and Karim became close friends.
